title: Hold You Tight
overview: Two women are bound for the same plane, one of whom makes the flight while the other does not. In a cruel twist of fate, the plane crashes, killing everyone on board, and leaving the friends and family of the two women to talk about what was and what could have been.

trailers.title: Hold You Tight (愈快樂愈墮落, 1997) de Stanley Kwan
